bibliography:
Information Systems Auditing: Tools and Techniques, ISACA, 2015
	COBIT 2019 Framework - Governance and Management Objectives, ISACA, 2018
methodology: Many classes operate in the flipped classroom model. Classes encourage active participation by students in presentations and discussions with colleagues.
objectives: Learning the theoretical and practical concepts of information systems auditing, both from the perspective of an information systems auditor and from the perspective of a manager of the audited IT organization. This discipline provides the necessary knowledge for students to start a professional career as auditors of information systems, but also enables them as professionals to deal with audits of their IT organization.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
1. What is information systems auditing

2. Audit processes and methodologies

3. Risk assessment models

4. Internal control system

5. Cobit
presentation: Learning the fundamental theoretical and practical concepts in auditing information systems.
avaliacao:
Avaliação de conhecimentos

- Trabalhos semanais, a serem entregues na aula seguinte (peso: 50% na avaliação final)

- Frequência / exame (peso: 50% na avaliação final)
